phase.linking: Linking your account to Koolman Work...

success.title: Account linked
success.lastStep: Last step: add Koolman Work as a friend to receive notifications
success.redirecting: Taking you to the add-friend page...

error.title: Couldn't link your account
error.notInLine: Please open this link inside the LINE app
error.noIdToken: LINE didn't return your identity — please try again
error.supabaseRejected: Authentication was rejected — please contact an admin
error.misconfigured: The system isn't fully configured — please contact an admin
error.linkInvalidTampered: The link is invalid or has been altered
error.linkUsed: This link has already been used or revoked — contact an admin for a new one
error.linkExpired: The link has expired — contact an admin for a new one
error.employeeArchived: This employee account is no longer active
error.alreadyLinked: This account is already linked to LINE
error.accountInUseAdmin: This account is already linked to someone else — if you are logged in as an admin, log out first and try again
error.lineInUse: This LINE account is already used by another employee — contact an admin to check
error.accountInUse: This account is already used by another employee — contact an admin
error.employeeNotFound: Employee account not found — contact an admin for a new link
error.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact an admin

notifications.leaveApprovedDeduction: Note: over-quota leave — {amount} will be deducted from your pay

advanceApproved.subtitle: Will be deducted from your next payslip

advanceRejected.subtitle: Please contact an admin for more information

disputeApproved.subtitle: An admin reviewed and confirmed the flagged check-in

disputeRejected.subtitle: An admin did not confirm that check-in

checkin.done: ✓ All done for today. Thank you!

error.gpsNotSupported: This browser does not support GPS
error.geoPermissionDenied: Please allow location access for this app
error.geoPositionUnavailable: Location unavailable — try moving to an open area
error.geoTimeout: Location took too long — please try again
error.sessionExpired: Session expired — please re-open in LINE
error.decodeFailed: Could not read the photo file
error.imageTooLarge: Image is too large, please try again
error.checkInDisabled: This account is blocked from checking in — contact an admin
error.archived: This account is no longer active
error.selfieRequired: Your branch requires a selfie — please take one and try again
error.dbError: Something went wrong. Please try again

selfie.title: Take selfie
selfie.instruction: Take a selfie to verify your identity
selfie.branchRequirement: Your branch requires a selfie at check-in
selfie.cameraUnavailable: Camera unavailable — please allow camera access, or use the button below

disputeReason.noConfiguredBranch: Branch location not set yet — contact an admin
disputeReason.gpsTooImprecise: GPS signal not accurate enough — try an open area
disputeReason.impossibleTravel: Distance and time don't match — needs review

new.title: Submit leave request
new.subtitle: Fill in all details to send your request to admin
new.unpaidNote: Note: this leave type is unpaid
new.previewAdminNote: * Admin will recalculate including holidays at approval
new.exceedsBlock: Exceeds your remaining balance — this leave type cannot be approved over quota. The request may be rejected.
new.exceedsDeduct: Exceeds balance by {over} — if approved, about {amount} will be deducted from your pay
new.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. sick leave to see a doctor, attending a relative's wedding

error.sessionExpired: Session expired — please re-open in LINE
error.decodeFailed: Could not read the image file
error.tooLarge: File is too large, please try again

errors.employeeArchived: This employee account is no longer active
errors.shortReason: Please enter a reason of at least {min} characters
errors.endBeforeStart: End date cannot be before the start date
errors.pastDate: Leave can be back-dated up to {days} days — for older dates, contact an admin to record it
errors.tooFarFuture: End date is too far away (more than 1 year)
errors.badUnit: This leave type doesn't support the selected unit
errors.partialSingleDay: Partial leave must be a single day
errors.partialClosedDay: Partial leave isn't allowed on a closed day
errors.badSegment: The selected time range is invalid
errors.overlap: You already have a leave request overlapping this date/time
errors.dbError: Something went wrong. Please try again
errors.notOwner: You are not the owner of this leave request
errors.notCancellable: Only requests that haven't been reviewed can be cancelled

balance.overdrawnAlert: ⚠️ Advance exceeds salary — next payroll will deduct the full amount and may go negative. Contact admin if you have questions.
balance.autoDeductNote: Approved advances will be automatically deducted from your next payslip.
balance.rateNote: Available amount depends on days/hours worked this period — contact admin for an exact figure.

new.title: Request cash advance
new.subtitle: The advance will be automatically deducted from your next payslip.
new.note: Only one pending request is allowed at a time. To submit another, wait for admin to decide or cancel the existing request first.
new.exceedsCap: Exceeds your available amount ({available} left). The request may be rejected.

errors.employeeArchived: This employee account is no longer active
errors.badAmount: Amount must be a positive number (up to 2 decimal places)
errors.tooLarge: You can request up to ฿{max, number} per advance
errors.pendingExists: You already have a pending advance request — cancel it or wait for the admin decision
errors.dbError: Something went wrong. Please try again
errors.notOwner: You are not the owner of this request
errors.notCancellable: Only requests that haven't been reviewed can be cancelled
